name: panther
description: Symfony Panther — End-to-End- & Browser-Testing für PHP: echte Browser via WebDriver (Chrome/Firefox) und headless HTTP via BrowserKit, PantherTestCase/Client/Crawler-API, Formulare & Interaktionen, Mouse/Keyboard, waitFor*-Mechanik, JavaScript-Ausführung, Screenshots, alle PANTHER_*-Umgebungsvariablen, Selenium/Proxy/SSL, Real-Time-Tests, Docker & CI.
